mapper.sql: MENU_NUMB, SUBX_NUMB, MENU_NAME, MENU_URLX, READ_AUTH, WRIT_AUTH, DELT_AUTH, SORT_ORDR, USEE_YSNO, REGI_ADMN, REGI_DATE, MODX_ADMN, MODX_DATE
mapper.select: SELECT M.MENU_NUMB, M.SUBX_NUMB, M.MENU_NAME, M.MENU_URLX, M.READ_AUTH, M.WRIT_AUTH, M.DELT_AUTH, M.SORT_ORDR, M.USEE_YSNO, M.REGI_ADMN, M.REGI_DATE, M.MODX_ADMN, M.MODX_DATE FROM TM_MENUXM M LEFT JOIN TB_CODEXD R ON R.COMM_CODE = 'AUTH_CODE' AND R.COMD_CODE = M.READ_AUTH AND NVL(R.USEE_YSNO, 'Y') = 'Y' WHERE NVL(M.USEE_YSNO, 'Y') = 'Y' AND ( M.READ_AUTH IS NULL OR R.SORT_ORDER <= #{authLevel} ) ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(M.MENU_NUMB), TO_NUMBER(M.SUBX_NUMB), NVL(M.SORT_ORDR, 9999)

SELECT M.MENU_URLX, R.SORT_ORDER AS READ_LEVEL, W.SORT_ORDER AS WRIT_LEVEL, D.SORT_ORDER AS DELT_LEVEL FROM TM_MENUXM M LEFT JOIN TB_CODEXD R ON R.COMM_CODE = 'AUTH_CODE' AND R.COMD_CODE = M.READ_AUTH AND NVL(R.USEE_YSNO, 'Y') = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TB_CODEXD W ON W.COMM_CODE = 'AUTH_CODE' AND W.COMD_CODE = M.WRIT_AUTH AND NVL(W.USEE_YSNO, 'Y') = 'Y' LEFT JOIN TB_CODEXD D ON D.COMM_CODE = 'AUTH_CODE' AND D.COMD_CODE = M.DELT_AUTH AND NVL(D.USEE_YSNO, 'Y') = 'Y' WHERE M.MENU_URLX = #{menuUrlx} AND NVL(M.USEE_YSNO, 'Y') = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT
FROM TM_MENUXM ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(MENU_NUMB), TO_NUMBER(SUBX_NUMB), NVL(SORT_ORDR, 9999)

SELECT
FROM TM_MENUXM WHERE MENU_NUMB = #{menuNumb} AND SUBX_NUMB != '0' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SUBX_NUMB), NVL(SORT_ORDR, 9999)
SELECT TO_CHAR(NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(MENU_NUMB)), 0) + 1) FROM TM_MENUXM WHERE SUBX_NUMB = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TM_MENUXM ( MENU_NUMB, SUBX_NUMB, MENU_NAME, MENU_URLX, READ_AUTH, WRIT_AUTH, DELT_AUTH, SORT_ORDR, USEE_YSNO, REGI_ADMN, REGI_DATE ) VALUES ( #{menuNumb}, #{subxNumb}, #{menuName}, #{menuUrlx}, #{readAuth}, #{writAuth}, #{deltAuth}, #{sortOrdr}, #{useeYsno}, #{regiAdmn}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE TM_MENUXM SET MENU_NAME = #{menuName}, MENU_URLX = #{menuUrlx}, READ_AUTH = #{readAuth}, WRIT_AUTH = #{writAuth}, DELT_AUTH = #{deltAuth}, SORT_ORDR = #{sortOrdr}, USEE_YSNO = #{useeYsno}, MODX_ADMN = #{modxAdmn}, MODX_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE MENU_NUMB = #{menuNumb} AND SUBX_NUMB = #{subxNumb}
